loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current harmonic distortion (I-THD) and voltage unbalance as proxies for flicker/crest factor; voltage THD and individual harmonic orders (H5/H7) are not recorded for this asset.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD trends (I-THD) and voltage THD trends (V-THD) where available; specific harmonic orders (H5/H7) and voltage THD data are not currently recorded for this asset.
